source.title: Never Buy Bread Again! The Easiest 4-Ingredient Daily Bread (No Kneading)
source.author: Food Language

candidate.title: Never Buy Bread Again! The Easiest 4-Ingredient Daily Bread (No Kneading)
candidate.description:
Make bakery-quality bread at home with just 4 ingredients and no kneading. This recipe builds incredible flavor through a simple preferment, and the stretch-and-fold method does all the work for you. If you've ever struggled with bread, this one will change that.

*Ingredients:*

*Starter:*
* Water - ½ cup (120 ml)
* Fresh yeast - ¾ tsp. (3 g) or dry yeast - ½ tsp. (2 g)
* Bread flour - 1 cup (120 g)

*Main dough:*
* Water - 7 tbsp (100 ml)
* Bread flour - 1⅔ cups (200 g)
* Salt - 1 tsp (6 g)

This is really it! 4 basic ingredients to make amazing, bakery-quality bread.

*My other awesome channels:*
Sweet Bread Recipes 👉 https://www.youtube.com/@sweet-bread-recipes
Cookie Corner 👉 https://www.youtube.com/@The-Cookie-Corner

Tools I Used:

Baking pan I used to bake this bread: https://amzn.to/3N8ZPUi (I used two of them, one turned upside down and used as cover)

Alternative pan:
* https://amzn.to/49UyaOo - either two of these, one turned upside down and used as a cover, or one, but covered with aluminum foil for the first bake.
* https://amzn.to/4gnx6Fb - same as the previous pan.

* https://amzn.to/4qCUXVM - my favorite bread lame

You get two loaves from one batch, each with a thin, flaky crust that crackles as it cools and a soft, open crumb inside. They slice cleanly and taste just as good the next day.

If you try this recipe, leave a comment below and let me know how it turned out! Subscribe for a new bread recipe every week.

Disclaimer: As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.

#bread #foodlanguage #recipe
